hero.sub: Tora nhamba yefoni yakachengeteka yemahara yekufonera uye kutumira mameseji pasi rese uchishandisa Wi-Fi kana data. Nakidzwa ne encryption kubva kumagumo kusvika kumagumo, mameseji ari kunyangarika, uye HD voice/video calling — nematurusi akavakirwa mukati anokubatsira kuti urambe wakabatana nemiganhu.

why.disclaimer: Kuenzanisa kwakavakirwa paruzivo rwunowanikwa pachena uye kunogona kuchinja nekufamba kwenguva. Mamwe maapplication ekutumira mameseji emahara akadai seTextFree kana TextMe anowanzo fanana neTextNow.

faq.title: Mibvunzo Inowanzo bvunzwa Pamusoro Pemitengo & Zvirongwa

free.q: Ko hurongwa hwemahara hwakasununguka zvechokwadi here?
free.a: Ehe. Chirongwa chemahara chinosanganisira nhamba yeChatforia, kufona, uye kutumira mameseji nezviziviso. Unogona kugara paMahara chero nguva yaunoda, kana kusimudzira kuti ubvise zviziviso uye kuvhura zvimwe zvinhu.

plusPremium.q: Musiyano uripo pakati pePlus nePremium ndeupi?
plusPremium.a: Uye zvakare inobvisa kushambadza uye inowedzera nhoroondo yemeseji yako — yakakodzera kushandiswa kwezuva nezuva. Premium inowedzera kugadzirisa, maturusi eAI ekunyora patsva uye kupindura, uye rutsigiro rwekutanga kune vashandisi vakawanda.

esim.a: Chatforia Mobile inoshandisa eSIM coverage yepasi rose. Kuwanikwa kwayo kunoenderana nenyika yako nemudziyo wako. Uchaona sarudzo dzinotsigirwa panguva yekushanda mukati meapp.

forgotPassword.title: Wakanganwa Password
forgotPassword.helper: Isa email yawakashandisa kugadzira account yako yeChatforia uye tichakutumira link yakachengeteka kuti udzorere password yako patsva.
forgotPassword.genericError: Hatina kukwanisa kugadzirisa chikumbiro. Ndapota edza zvakare munguva pfupi iri kutevera.
forgotPassword.sentHelper: Kana paine account ine email iyoyo, tatumira link yekugadzirisa password. Zvinogona kutora maminetsi mashoma kuti zvisvike. Ita shuwa kuti watarisa folder rako re spam kana repromotions.

resetPassword.title: Dzorerazve Password
resetPassword.missingToken: Chiratidzo chekugadzirisa password chisina kushanda kana kuti chiripo.
resetPassword.missingTokenHelper: Tokeni haisi kushanda kana kuti haipo. Ndapota kumbirai link itsva yekugadzirisa password.
resetPassword.strongPasswordHint: Sarudza password yakasimba yausingashandise kune imwe nzvimbo.

support.heading: Tingabatsira sei?
support.contactIntro: Tichaedza kugadzirisa izvi ipapo ipapo. Kana zvikasadaro, timu yedu ichatevera.
support.sendError: Hatina kukwanisa kutumira. Tumira email ku support@chatforia.com.
support.actionFailed: Hazvina kukwanisa kupedzisa chiito ichocho. Ndapota edza zvakare.
support.ticketCreated: Hatina kukwanisa kugadzirisa izvi otomatiki. Chikwata chedu chichatevera.
support.escalationMessage: Hatina kukwanisa kugadzirisa izvi otomatiki. Chikwata chedu chichatevera.

account.q: Ndingagadzira sei kana kudzoreredza account yangu?
account.a: Dhawunirodha app kana kushandisa web, tinya "Gadzira account", simbisa email/phone yako. Kuti udzore, shandisa "Wakanganwa password".

privacy.q: Mashoko acho anonyorwa kubva pamagumo kusvika pamagumo here?
privacy.a: Ehe. Mameseji nemafoni zvinovharwa kubva pamagumo kusvika pamagumo. Iwe chete nemugamuchiri ndiwe chete munogona kuzviverenga.

translate.a: Shandisa "Auto-translate" muMagadzirirwo → Chitarisiko & Mutauro. Tinoshandura pamudziyo kana zvichitsigirwa, zvikasadaro kuburikidza nemaAPI akachengeteka ane metadata shoma.

contact.a: Tibate pa support@chatforia.com. Isa mapikicha neshanduro yeapp yako.

section2.item2: Shandisa kushandura ipapo ipapo kuti utaure mumitauro inodarika zana.

howItWorks.title: Mashandiro Anoita Chatforia
howItWorks.intro: Chatforia yakagadzirirwa kuita kuti kutaurirana kuve nyore, kukurumidze, uye kuve nyore. Kutanga kunotora matanho mashoma chete.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Nyorera uchishandisa email yako kana zita rekushandisa kuti ugadzire account yako yeChatforia.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Batana nevamwe nekusarudza vanhu vaunosangana navo kana kutanga machat matsva.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Mashoko anotumirwa nekukurumidza kuti ape ruzivo rwakakwana rwekutaurirana.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Shanduro yakavakirwa mukati inobatsira vashandisi kutaurirana mumitauro yakasiyana.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Ronga zvaunoda, vanhu vaunosangana navo, uye marongero ekutaurirana.

safety.title: Nhungamiro dzeKuchengetedzeka & Nharaunda
safety.intro: Chatforia yakazvipira kuchengetedza nzvimbo yakachengeteka uye ine ruremekedzo kune vese vashandisi. Mitemo iyi inobatsira kuona kuti munhu wese anowana ruzivo rwakanaka.
safety.respectDesc: Vashandisi vanotarisirwa kutaurirana neruremekedzo. Kushungurudza, kushungurudza, kana maitiro anokuvadza hazvibvumirwi.

tools.report: Taura nezvemaitiro asina kukodzera kana zviri mukati
tools.control: Ronga marongero ekuchengetedza zvakavanzika uye ekutaurirana

safety.enforcementDesc: Tinogona kutora matanho ekupikisa maakaundi anotyora nhungamiro idzi, kusanganisira yambiro, zvirambidzo, kana kubviswa zvachose pachikuva.

whyMessaging.title: Nei Mapuratifomu Ekutumira Meseji Achikosha Kupfuura Kare
whyMessaging.intro: Mapuratifomu ekutumira mameseji ave chimwe chezvishandiso zvakakosha pakutaurirana munyika yanhasi. Kubva pakukurukurirana kwevanhu kusvika pakutaurirana kwebhizinesi, maapplication ekutumira mameseji anobvumira vanhu kuramba vakabatana ipapo ipapo uye zvinobudirira.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: Vanhu vanovimba nemapurogiramu ekutumira mameseji ezuva nezuva neshamwari, mhuri, uye vashandi pamwe chete. Ingava nhaurirano pfupi kana hurukuro refu, kutumira mameseji kunopa nzira iri nyore uye inochinjika yekutaura nevanhu.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: Chimwe chezvakanakira zvikuru zvemapuratifomu ekutumira mameseji kumhanya kwawo. Mashoko anotumirwa ipapo ipapo, zvichibvumira vashandisi kutaurirana panguva chaiyo. Kureruka uku kwakaita kuti kutumira mameseji kuve nzira inofarirwa nevanhu vazhinji yekutaurirana.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Mapuratifomu ekutumira mameseji anobatanidza vanhu pasi rose. Nekushandisa internet, vashandisi vanogona kutaurirana zvisinei nenzvimbo, zvichiita kuti zvive nyore kuvaka hukama nekushandira pamwe pasi rese.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Mapuratifomu emazuva ano ekutumira mameseji anotarisa pakupa vashandisi simba pamusoro pedata ravo nehurukuro dzavo. Zvinhu zvakaita se encryption, kuchengetedzwa kwekuchengetedzwa kwemashoko, uye kudzora mameseji zvinobvumira vashandisi kutaurirana nechivimbo.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Kutumirana mameseji kuri kuramba kuchichinja nemabasa matsva akadai semhinduro dzinoshandisa AI, kushandura, uye kugovera multimedia. Sezvo tekinoroji ichifambira mberi, mapuratifomu ekutumira mameseji achawedzera kuva nesimba uye anochinjika.
whyMessaging.outro: Chatforia yakavakwa nepfungwa idzi, ichipa ruzivo rwekutumira mameseji nekukurumidza, kwakachengeteka, uye kuri nyore kushandisa kune nyika yakabatana.

global.title: Remangwana reKutaurirana Pasi Pose
global.intro: Kutaurirana kwave kuchichinja nekukurumidza mumakumi emakore apfuura. Zvaimboda kufona kana misangano yekuonana zvino zvinogona kuitwa nekukurumidza kuburikidza nemapuratifomu ekutumira mameseji. Sezvo tekinoroji iri kuramba ichifambira mberi, kutaurirana kwepasi rose kuri kukurumidza, kusvikika, uye kubatanidzwa.
global.barriersDesc: Chimwe chezvishanduko zvikuru mukutaurirana ikudzikiswa kwezvipingamupinyi zvenzvimbo. Vanhu vava kukwanisa kubatana nevamwe pasi rese munguva pfupi iri kutevera. Ingava yekukurukurirana kwevanhu, bhizinesi, kana kushanda pamwe chete, mapuratifomu ekutumira mameseji akaita kuti daro rive shoma.
global.translationDesc: Mutauro wagara uri chimwe chezvipingamupinyi zvikuru pakutaurirana pasi rose. Nhasi, maturusi ekushandura akavakirwa mukati anobatsira kuvhara musiyano iwoyo. Mapuratifomu akaita seChatforia anobvumira vashandisi kutaurirana zviri nyore kunyangwe vachitaura mitauro yakasiyana, zvichigadzira mikana mitsva yekubatana nekunzwisisana.
global.realtimeDesc: Kumhanya ndicho chinhu chikuru chinoumba kutaurirana kwemazuva ano. Vashandisi vanotarisira kuti mameseji apihwe nekukurumidza, uye zvivakwa zvemazuva ano zvinotsigira tarisiro iyoyo. Kutumira mameseji panguva chaiyo kunogonesa kukurukurirana kwakajairika uye kwakapfava.
global.privacyDesc: Sezvo kutaurirana kuri kuwedzera pakuva nedhijitari, kuvanzika nekuchengetedzwa kuri kuwedzera kukosha. Vashandisi vanoda chivimbo chekuti hurukuro dzavo dzakachengetedzwa. Zvinhu zvakaita sekuvharidzira uye marongero anodzorwa nemushandisi zvinobatsira kutsigira ruzivo rwekutaurirana rwakachengeteka.
global.futureDesc: Remangwana rekutaurirana pasi rose ringangosanganisira maturusi epamusoro-soro, akadai sekutumira mameseji anobatsirwa neAI, shanduro yakavandudzwa, uye ruzivo rwakawedzerwa rwevashandisi. Sezvo tekinoroji ichifambira mberi, kutaurirana kucharamba kuri nyore kunzwisisa uye kuri nyore kuwana.
global.outro: Mapuratifomu akaita seChatforia chikamu chekuchinja uku, zvichibatsira vanhu kubatana zviri nyore nepakati pemitauro nemiganhu.

index.title: Blog reChatforia
index.intro: Ongorora ruzivo pamusoro pekutaurirana, kuchengetedzeka paindaneti, uye kuti tekinoroji yekutumira mameseji iri kubatanidza sei vanhu pasi rese.

chatSafely.title: Maitiro Ekutaura Zvakachengeteka Pamhepo
chatSafely.intro: Kutaurirana paindaneti kwakaita kuti zvive nyore kupfuura kare kusangana nevanhu pasi rese. Ungave uchitumirana mameseji neshamwari, kusangana nevanhu vatsva, kana kushanda pamwe chete nebasa, mapuratifomu ekutumira mameseji ane basa guru muhupenyu hwezuva nezuva. Zvisinei, kugara wakachengeteka paindaneti kwakakosha sekugara wakabatana.

personalInfo.title: Dzivirira Ruzivo Rwako Rwepachivande
personalInfo.body: Imwe yemitemo inonyanya kukosha yekuchengetedza pamhepo ndeyekudzivisa kugovera ruzivo rwemunhu rwakavanzika. Izvi zvinosanganisira kero yako yekumba, ruzivo rwemari, mapassword, kana chero ruzivo rwekuzvizivisa runogona kushandiswa zvisirizvo. Kunyangwe muhurukuro dzisina kurongeka, zvakanaka kuti uzive zvaunogovana uye kuti ndiani waunogovana naye.

safetyFeatures.title: Shandisa Zvinhu Zvekuchengetedza Zvakavakirwa Mukati
safetyFeatures.body: Mapuratifomu emazuva ano ekutumira mameseji seChatforia anopa maturusi ekubatsira vashandisi kuti vagare vakachengeteka. Zvinhu zvakaita sekuvharira, kushuma, uye kudzora zvakavanzika zvakagadzirirwa kupa vashandisi simba pamusoro pezvavanosangana nazvo. Kana mumwe munhu akaita zvisina kunaka kana kuti akakugumbura, unofanira kushandisa maturusi aya nekukasika.

scams.title: Ngwarira Zvitsotsi
scams.body: Vanyengeri vanowanzo shandisa mapuratifomu ekutumira mameseji kunyengedza vashandisi kuti vagovane ruzivo rwavo kana kutumira mari. Chenjerera mameseji anoita seakanyanya kunaka kuti ave echokwadi, akadai sezvipo zvisingatarisirwi, zvikumbiro zvekukurumidzira, kana ma link asina kujairika. Gara uchiongorora kuti munhu wauri kutaura naye ndiani usati waita chero chiito.

responsibly.title: Kurukura Nemutoro
responsibly.body: Kutaurirana zvine ruremekedzo kunobatsira kugadzira nzvimbo yakachengeteka kune wese munhu. Dzivisa kutaurirana kunokuvadza kana kutuka, uye cherechedza kuti mashoko ako angakanganisa sei vamwe. Kutaurirana kwakanaka kunobatsira kuti vashandisi vese vave neruzivo rwakanaka.

whySafety.title: Nei Kuchengetedzwa Pamhepo Kuchikosha
whySafety.body: Sezvo kutaurirana kwedhijitari kuri kuramba kuchikura, kuchengetedza kuchengetedzeka nekuvimbana kunowedzera kukosha. Nekutevera tsika dzekuchengetedza uye kushandisa maturusi aripo, vashandisi vanogona kunakidzwa nemabhenefiti ekutumira mameseji uku vachideredza njodzi.

chatSafely.conclusion: Kugara wakachengeteka paindaneti hakudi ruzivo rwepamusoro rwehunyanzvi—kungoziva, kungwarira, uye kufunga zvakanaka. Netsika dzakakodzera, unogona kutaurirana uine chivimbo uye wakachengeteka.

about.title: NezveChatforia
about.description: Chatforia inhume yakachengeteka, ine mitauro yakawanda ine encryption kubva kumagumo kusvika kumagumo, kushandura ipapo ipapo, uye kufona nenzwi/vhidhiyo. Basa redu rakareruka: kubatsira vanhu kubatana—zvakachengeteka, pachivande, uye mumitauro yakasiyana-siyana.

about.howDescription: Mashoko anovharwa pamudziyo wako asati abuda. Kushandura, kuchengetedza makopi, uye kuwiriranisa zvishandiso zvakagadzirirwa kuderedza zvinoonekwa nemaseva edu.
about.privacyDesc: Kudzivirira ruzivo kubva pakutanga kusvika pakupedzisira uye kuchengetedza ruzivo rwepachivande zvakavakirwa muChatforia.

press.title: Dhinda
press.contactLine: Kuti muwane mibvunzo kubva kune vezvenhau, tibvunzei panhamba iyi
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia ipurogiramu yekutumira mameseji yekutanga yekuvanzika inoita kuti kutaura mumitauro yakasiyana kuve nyore. Mameseji anovharwa kubva kumagumo kusvika kumagumo, uye shanduro yakavakirwa mukati inotsigira mitauro inopfuura zana munguva chaiyo. Vashandisi vanogona kugonesa mameseji anonyangarika, kuchengetedza marisiti ekuverenga, uye kuwiriranisa pamidziyo yese. Inowanikwa pa iOS, Android, uye pawebhu.
press.assetsSubtitle: Malogo, mapikicha emifananidzo, uye mifananidzo yechigadzirwa.
press.scanTip: Uri pakombiyuta here? Skena nefoni yako kuti uwane app.

careers.title: Mabasa
careers.intro: Tiri timu diki yekutanga iri kuvaka Chatforia — kambani yekutumira mameseji yepasi rose yakazvimirira pawebhu, iOS, neAndroid. Kana muchida ruzivo rwekuchengetedza zvakavanzika, ruzivo rwekuvharira, uye ruzivo runonakidza rwevashandisi, tinoda kunzwa kubva kwamuri.
careers.openRoles: Mabasa evakatanga mapurogiramu: Mutungamiriri weFull-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Maitiro ekunyorera: Shandisa bhatani riri pazasi kutumira email yako ne link.
careers.whyBullets:
• Batsirai kuvaka hwaro hwemutumwa mutsva wepasi rose.
• Kuvandudzwa kwekutumira kunoshandiswa pawebhu, iOS, neAndroid.
• Shanda zvakananga nemuvambi pakugadzira uye kutungamira kwechigadzirwa.
• Iva nenzvimbo dzine simba guru mu stack: kutumira mameseji, izwi, vhidhiyo, encryption, telecom, AI.
• Joinha pakutanga — mushandisi asati asvika padanho repamusoro.

advertise.title: Shambadza neChatforia
advertise.description: Svikai kune vashandisi vekutumira mameseji vane hunyanzvi nekuisa nzvimbo dzakanaka uye dzakachengeteka. Tinopa zvinyorwa zvemabhana munzvimbo dzinoonekwa zvakanyanya, dzinotsigirwa nevanhu, uye dzinoshambadzirwa nevanhu. Vanyoreri vepamusoro havaoni zviziviso.

intro.body: Mutemo uyu wekuchengetedza ruzivo unotsanangura kuti Chatforia ("isu", "isu") inounganidza sei, inoshandisa sei, uye inogovana sei ruzivo kana uchishandisa maapplication nemasevhisi edu. Isu tinogadzira Chatforia kuderedza data ratinogona kuwana.

infoWeCollect.title: Ruzivo rwatinounganidza
infoWeCollect.account: Ruzivo rweakaundi (semuenzaniso, email/foni) kuti ugadzire uye uchengetedze account yako.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Zviri mukati memashoko (mashoko/mafoni) zvinonyorwa kubva pakutanga kusvika pakupedzisira; hatigoni kuzviverenga.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Kuongorora/kushandiswa kwakaita semarogi ekudonha kwedata, rudzi rwechishandiso, kana kuongorora kwakashata kuti zvivandudze mashandiro.

sms.title: Nhamba dzefoni neSMS
sms.body: Kana ukasarudza kupa nhamba yefoni, tinoishandisa kugonesa zvinhu zvakaita sekusimbiswa kweakaundi, zviziviso zvekupinda, uye mameseji kubva kumushandisi kuenda kumushandisi kuburikidza neSMS kana zvichitsigirwa. Tinogona kutumira mameseji eSMS ane chekuita neakaundi yako uye zviitiko paChathoria. Unogona kusarudza kusagamuchira mameseji eSMS chero nguva nekupindura neshoko rekuti "opt-out" rinotsigirwa (rakadai sekuti "STOP") kana nekushandura zvaunofarira pakuzivisa muapp. Hatitengesi nhamba yako yefoni kana kuishandisa pakushambadzira kusina chekuita.

sharing.title: Kugovana
sharing.body: Hatitengesi ruzivo rwemunhu. Tinogona kugovera ruzivo rushoma nevagadziri (semuenzaniso, zviziviso zve push, analytics) pasi pezvibvumirano zvakasimba.

rights.title: Kodzero dzako
rights.body: Zvichienderana nedunhu rako (semuenzaniso, GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), unogona kukumbira kupinda, kugadzirisa, kubvisa, kana kusaita zvimwe zvinhu. Bata na: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Kuchengetedzwa kwedata uye kuchengetedzeka
retention.body: Tinongochengeta zvinodiwa chete kuti tishandise sevhisi iyi uye tishandise kuchengetedzwa kwakajairika kweindasitiri. Hatigone kubvisa zviri mukati meE2E.

children.body: Chatforia haina kunangidzirwa kuvana vari pasi pemakore gumi nematatu (kana sezvinodiwa nemutemo wemuno).

sms.title: Kutaurirana neSMS
sms.body: Kana ukapa nhamba yefoni, unobvuma kuti Chatforia inogona kukutumira mameseji eSMS ane chekuita neakaundi yako uye mashandisirwo ebasa racho, akadai sezviziviso zvekupinda, zviziviso zvekuchengetedza, uye mameseji ane chekuita nehurukuro dzaunotanga kana kutora chikamu mazviri. Hatishandisi SMS kumashoko ekushambadzira kana ekushambadzira pasina mvumo yako yakajeka. Mitengo yemeseji nedata inogona kushanda. Unogona kusarudza kusagamuchira mameseji eSMS chero nguva nekupindura neshoko rekuti "opt-out" rinotsigirwa (semuenzaniso, "STOP") kana nekuvandudza marongero ako ezviziviso muapp.

yourContent.title: Zvemukati mako
yourContent.body: Munochengetedza kodzero dzezviri mukati menyu. Munotipa kodzero dzinodiwa kuti tishandise sevhisi iyi (semuenzaniso, kuendesa zvinhu kunzira, kuchengetedza, kushandura).

disclaimer.title: Zvirambidzo & mutoro
disclaimer.body: Basa rinoitwa "sezvariri" pasina vimbiso. Kusvika pamwero wakazara unobvumirwa nemutemo, Chatforia haina mhosva yekukuvadzwa kusina kunanga kana kwakakonzerwa nako.

subscriptions.title: Kunyoresa
subscriptions.body: Kunyoresa kunobhadhariswa pachine nguva nguva nenguva. Unogona kukanzura chero nguva kuburikidza nemarongero eakaundi yako kana puratifomu yaunoshandisa kutenga.

eligibility.title: Kukodzera Kudzoserwa Mari
eligibility.body: Mari inogona kudzoserwa kana paine mari mbiri, zvikanganiso zvekubhadhara, kana matambudziko ehunyanzvi anotadzisa vanhu kuwana zvinhu zvakabhadharwa. Zvikumbiro zvese zvinoongororwa zvichienderana nemamiriro ezvinhu.

nonRefundable.title: Haizodzoserwi mari
nonRefundable.body: Kazhinji hatidzosere mari yenguva isina kushandiswa, nguva dzekunyorera dzisina kukwana, kana kutadza kukanzura tisati tavandudza.

thirdParty.body: Kana ukatenga kuburikidza nemapuratifomu evamwe vanhu vakaita seApple App Store, mari yekudzoserwa inofanirwa kukumbirwa zvakananga kuburikidza nemapuratifomu iwayo.

cookies.title: Zvirongwa zveMakuki
cookies.body: Chatforia inoshandisa makuki mashoma (semuenzaniso, session, security). Hatishandise makuki ekushambadzira evamwe vanhu. Ronga makuki uchishandisa marongero ebrowser yako.

whatWeSend.title: Zvatinotumira
whatWeSend.body: Chatforia inongotumira SMS ine chekuita neakaundi uye yekukurukurirana kunhamba dzefoni idzo mushandisi anenge atumira pachena uye abvuma. Mameseji anowanzo sanganisira makodhi ekupinda/kusimbisa, zviziviso zvekutumira meseji, zviziviso zvekuchengetedza, uye zvigadziriso zveakaundi yekutengeserana.

optIn.title: Maitiro ekusarudza kwevashandisi kupinda
optIn.body: Vashandisi vanosarudza kupinda nekuisa nhamba dzavo dzefoni panguva yekunyoresa uye kutarisa bhokisi reSMS rekutarisa mvumo riri papeji rekunyoresa kana rakatsaurirwa.
